items.claim: Gable Steveson looked questionable in his previous MMA performance.
items.quote: Gable look very questionable in his MMA fight.

items.claim: Conor McGregor has not been punched in the face in five years.
items.quote: McGregor hasn't been punched in the face in five years.

items.claim: Max Holloway's striking will be physically overwhelming for Conor McGregor.
items.quote: McGregor's not gonna like how it feels getting ripped by Max Holloway.

items.claim: Paddy Pimblett lacks technical striking ability.
items.quote: Patty can't strike. Patty striking's ugly

items.claim: Benoit Saint Denis utilizes a sloppy but effective striking style.
items.quote: BSD, he's a master of sloppy, bro.

items.claim: Benoit Saint Denis will dominate the early portion of the fight against Paddy Pimblett.
items.quote: I think early BSD is about to dog walk his ass, press him, throw crazy [ __ ]

items.claim: Paddy Pimblett will take over the fight against Benoit Saint Denis in the later rounds.
items.quote: slowly but surely Patty takes over.

items.claim: Conor McGregor will be TKO'd and exhibit a tendency to turtle up under pressure.
items.quote: I think he gets probably TKO'd, bro. I feel like he's turtling up aga
